compiled_state.title: As a DSO practitioner, the Deep Opus architectural reviewer applies cross-cutting synthesis checks across all specialist findings

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Enhance the Deep Opus architectural reviewer (code-reviewer-deep-arch.md) with researched sub-criteria for cross-cutting synthesis — tuned to this project's architecture and the specialist findings it synthesizes.

**Why**: The arch reviewer is the sole writer of authoritative reviewer-findings.json for deep tier. It synthesizes findings from all 3 sonnet specialists. Its current cross-cutting checks are generic and don't account for this project's key architectural boundaries (hook system, ticket system, skill system, plugin boundaries).

**Scope**:
- IN: Updating synthesis checklist with project-aware architectural boundaries; adding sub-criteria for cross-specialist conflict detection; researching architectural review best practices
- OUT: Modifying the single-writer invariant; changing the synthesis procedure; modifying the output contract

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the Deep Arch reviewer includes sub-criteria that check for violations of this project's key architectural boundaries (hook isolation, skill namespacing, ticket system encapsulation, plugin portability)
  ← Satisfies: 'Review Intelligence & Precision'
- When this story is complete, the synthesis procedure includes sub-criteria for detecting when specialist findings contradict each other (e.g., correctness says 'add error handling' but hygiene says 'reduce complexity')
  ← Satisfies: 'Review Intelligence & Precision'
- When this story is complete, unit tests verify the updated agent file structure
  ← Satisfies: 'Review Intelligence & Precision'

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Arch reviewer changes have the highest blast radius — all deep-tier reviews flow through it
- [Testing] Test synthesis quality by running against prior deep-tier specialist outputs

## Dependencies

This story should be implemented after the 3 sonnet specialist stories (dso-b7nb, dso-gfry, dso-b538) since the arch reviewer synthesizes their output.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Enhanced Deep arch reviewer with specialist conflict detection, architectural boundary checks, and domain-specific sub-criteria awareness
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
